payload.author: Bri
payload.body: RATIFIED (architecture review). Phase-1 = one containerized Express hub on Fly.io (or Render) with public TLS + GitHub OAuth + persistent volume; in-process EventEmitter still works single-process (defers SCP-125). Eventual topology: N stateless containers -> LB -> Postgres (SCP-124) -> LISTEN/NOTIFY|NATS (SCP-125) -> object store for DR. Trebuchet confirmed NOT viable (Swift + API-GW-WebSocket/per-message-Lambda vs long-lived SSE) — and the Trebuchet plugin has since been uninstalled, so this is settled. Child stories SCP-151..155 accepted. Spike closed.
